app.subtitle: Collaborative shopping made beautiful. Sign in to start your lists.
app.config_step1: Enable Google & Anonymous in Firebase Auth Console

coins.consumed_info: Coins are consumed starting from the oldest non-expired batch.

redeem_modal.info: Coins will be added to your balance instantly upon successful redemption.

delete_account_modal.title: Delete Account?
delete_account_modal.confirm: This action is permanent. All your lists, items, and profile information will be deleted forever.
delete_account_modal.reauth_required: For security, please sign out and sign back in before deleting your account.
